    EquipmentPanel(GameFrame frame, StatsPanel statsPanel, Game game)
    Creates an EquipmentPanel and initializes all equipment slots UI.

    Creates an options screen without an active game session.
     
    OptionScreen(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates an options screen for an active game session.
     
    StatusScreen(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates a new status screen displaying the player's stats, character image, and equipment information.
